title: rosa × dumetorum subvar. piligera
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subvar. piligera, also known as the wild rose or Rosa rugosa, is a species of rose native to East Asia, characterized by its pink or white flowers and fragrant foliage. The medicinal properties of Rosa × dumetorum subvar. piligera include its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving heart health, and boosting the immune system, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Rosa × dumetorum subvar. piligera include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal properties.
